subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested refactoring the code into a separate function, `do_mark_free_pages()`, to improve readability and maintainability.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes to modify the `mark_free_pages` function in the kernel's power management code to account for the new superpageblock (SPB) rework. The existing function walks the buddy allocator's free lists, but after SPB, free pages live on per-superpageblock free lists instead of zone-level free lists. This patch wraps the existing per-page walk in an SPB iteration loop and falls back to the zone-level list head if the zone has no SPBs.
